terms.title: Legal Terms and Conditions of Jadwa Investment Platform
terms.intro: Please read these terms and conditions carefully before using the Jadwa Investment Platform. Your use of the platform constitutes full and final acceptance.

definitions.title: Definitions
definitions.platform: Platform: The electronic investment system for displaying and managing investment opportunities.
definitions.user: User / Investor: Any individual or legal entity using the platform.
definitions.account: Account: The user's electronic account on the platform.
definitions.services: Services: All technical and informational services provided through the platform.

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.1: The user confirms having full legal capacity.
eligibility.2: The user must provide accurate and up-to-date information.
eligibility.3: The company may suspend or terminate accounts violating eligibility rules.

risks.title: Services Nature & Risks
risks.1: The platform does not guarantee profits.
risks.2: Investments involve risks including partial or total loss.
risks.3: All investment decisions are the sole responsibility of the user.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.1: The company is not liable for investment losses.
liability.2: The company does not guarantee third-party information accuracy.

law.title: Governing Law
law.text: These terms are governed and interpreted according to the laws of the Syrian Arab Republic.

instructions.title: Account Verification Instructions
instructions.intro: Please review these instructions carefully. By proceeding, you confirm all data is accurate and accept responsibility for any discrepancies.

profile.title: Profile Information & Documentation
profile.email: Email Address: The primary contact email linked to your investment account.
profile.id_number: ID Number: The unique national identification number as issued by government authorities.
profile.passport_number: Passport Number: The identification number found on the primary data page of your valid passport.
profile.passport_image: Passport photo: A clear, high-resolution upload of the front of the first page of the passport (Max size 2MB) is required only when adding the passport number.
profile.id_front: ID Document (Front): A clear, high-resolution upload of the front side of your national ID (Max size 2MB).
profile.id_back: ID Document (Back): A clear, high-resolution upload of the reverse side of your national ID (Max size 2MB).
profile.live_photo: Live Photo: A real-time facial photograph taken via the platform to verify identity.

requirements.title: Document Standards
requirements.1: All uploaded documents must be valid and not expired.
requirements.2: Images must be clear, uncropped, and free from glare or obstructions.
requirements.3: The 'Live Photo' must be taken in a well-lit environment without headwear or sunglasses.
